turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi there. My son needs to see a pediatrician, he's been running a fever for three days. Can I get an appointment today?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Oh, I hope he feels better soon! We have Dr. Deepa Thakur in pediatrics. She has a walk-in slot available today from 4 PM to 6 PM, or I can book a specific 4:30 PM slot for you.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: 4:30 would be great, let's do that.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: May I get the child's name and your contact number?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: The child is Arjun Kapoor, he's 6 years old. My number is 9712345678.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Booked! Arjun Kapoor with Dr. Deepa Thakur today at 4:30 PM. Please bring any previous prescriptions or vaccination records. See you soon, and I hope Arjun recovers quickly!
